name: FIREFIGHTER | Silvia Abramo
description:
WLW ˚୨୧⋆｡˚ | ❝Be My End❞ 🧯

Small town gossip and heroes were nothing new for Silvia. Your return to Brattleboro was nothing short of interesting, in between the hassle of moving furniture and cleaning up your childhood home, a blooming romance awaited.

Maybe she hadn't started this blind date on the right foot but now that she had seen you, Silvia was more than willing to give the two of you a shot.

A/N: The person who requested this is an absolute angel, I had had this poor girl in my drafts for months. She's finally free 😚🫶
